sections.paragraph:
ρύμη (ρύμη, ἡ,)
Etym. *ρύω ἐρύω

1. the force, swing, rush of a body in motion, Lat. impetus, ρύμῃ with a swing, Thuc.; πτερύγων ρύμη the rush of wings, Ar.; ἡ ρ. τῶν ἵππων Xen.:—metaph., εὐτυχεῖ ρύμῃ θεοῦ Eur.; ἡ ρ. τῆς ὀργῆς the vehemence of passion, Dem.

2. absol. a rush, charge, of soldiers, Thuc., Xen.

II*. a street, Lat. vicus, Polyb., NTest.
